simple_types.name: Unsigned_32
simple_types.code:
type Unsigned_32 is mod 2 ** 32
  with Size => 32;

simple_types.name: Unsigned_64
simple_types.code:
type Unsigned_64 is mod 2 ** 64
  with Size => 64;

subprograms.name: Next
subprograms.code: procedure Next (S : in out Generator; Value : out Unsigned_32)

subprograms.name: Reset
subprograms.code: procedure Reset (S : out Generator; Seed : Unsigned_64)
